nasb.text: and especially those who indulge the flesh in its corrupt desires and despise authority. Daring, self-willed, they do not tremble when they revile angelic majesties,

esv.text: and especially those who indulge in the lust of defiling passion and despise authority. Bold and willful, they do not tremble as they blaspheme the glorious ones,

cnv.text: 尤其是那些隨從肉體，生活在污穢的私慾中，和輕蔑當權的，更是這樣。他們膽大任性，毫無畏懼地毀謗在尊位的。

ccb.text: 尤其是那些放纵污秽的情欲、轻视权柄的人。他们胆大妄为，肆无忌惮地毁谤有尊荣的。

csbs.text: 尤其对那些随从肉体而在污秽的欲望中生活、轻视主权者的人，更是这样。 这些人胆大、任性，毫不战兢地亵渎那些有荣耀的。
